name: cloud-first-no-local-install
description: User wants to build for Cyoda Cloud without installing cyoda-go locally

input.userMessage: /cyoda:app — I want to use Cyoda Cloud, not install anything locally

expectedBehavior: Does not insist on local cyoda-go installation
Full journey works with cloud endpoint
antiPatterns: Insisting on local installation before cloud use
Skipping auth guidance for cloud setup
